name: Marble Mechanics
short_description: Design intricate marble runs in VR! Marble Mechanics combines sandbox creativity, physics puzzles, and relaxing soundscapes. Share tracks via Steam Workshop and explore a vibrant, player-driven world of rolling ingenuity.
detailed_description:
Marble Mechanics is an immersive VR sandbox, simulation, and puzzle experience where players design and craft intricate marble runs. With intuitive controls and realistic physics, it empowers imagination and creativity. Whether you're a builder who thrives on innovation or a spectator who enjoys the calming flow of marbles gliding through complex tracks, the game's soothing soundscapes and tranquil environment provide a engaging yet relaxing escape.

Features:

  • Interactive Tutorials & Puzzles: Learn core mechanics and challenge your engineering brain.

  • Creative Sandbox Mode: Edit, duplicate, group, save, load, and delete custom track setups with intuitive tools.

  • Infinite Undo/Redo: Tinker freely without fear—every mistake is reversible.

  • Auto-Alignment Toggle: Enable precision placement or go freeform; the choice is yours.

  • Adjustable Gravity Settings: Recreate Earth-like realism or invent bizarre new physics playgrounds.

  • Extensive Tooltips: Find the right features when you need them, without breaking creative flow.

  • Soothing Soundscapes: Immerse yourself in a meditative atmosphere while you build and explore.

  • Steam Workshop Integration: Share, download, remix, collaborate, Marble Mechanics is a community-powered experience.
